title: Context 예산·세션 분할 체크리스트 + 파일 크기 훅
scope_note: Original scope was doc-only (5/10). User expanded to include post-edit-size-check.sh hook at 2차 판단, raising score to 9/10.

fitness.rationale: hook auto-runs on every edit, warns on size budget violation, directly addresses context-bloat gotcha

gate2_verdict: PASS (no regression; hooks count 4→5, still maxed at 15/15)
applied_changes: working-rules.md: appended '세션 분할 체크리스트' (5 checkbox triggers) + '파일 크기 상한' table after CLAUDE.md Management section
post-edit-size-check.sh: new PostToolUse hook, warn-only, scoped to Write|Edit, respects HARVEST_ALLOW_OVERSIZE bypass
settings.json: registered post-edit-size-check.sh in PostToolUse hooks list
